hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.sh ]] && chmod +x "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *CLAUDE.md ]] && echo "[hook] $f modified — run /proofread-claude-md $f to check for stale references or contradictions"; } 2>/dev/null || true
